userStories.title: Configure Water Drop Parameters
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want to control the density, size, speed, and refraction strength of the water drops so that I can dial in the exact wet-glass look I need for my video.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Node exposes six numeric inputs: `drop_density` (INT, 1–200, default 60),
Each input widget is visible in the ComfyUI node and accepts the full
Node output is typed `EFFECT_PARAMS` and carries `{"effect_name": "water_drops", "params": {...}}`.

userStories.title: Live WebGL2 Preview in Node
userStories.description: As a ComfyUI workflow author, I want to see an animated preview of the water drops effect directly inside the node widget so that I can tweak parameters without running the full generation pipeline.
